title: Existing zoning ordinances
doc_html:
§140.50.35. Existing zoning ordinances

            Zoning ordinances of the town shall continue in effect until amended or repealed by ordinances enacted pursuant to the provisions of this Subpart.

            Acts 2019, No. 75, §1.
doc_text:
§140.50.35.  Existing zoning ordinances
Zoning ordinances of the town shall continue in effect until amended or repealed by
ordinances enacted pursuant to the provisions of this Subpart.
Acts 2019, No. 75, §1.
